name: studies_view_listings_analysis_study_metadata_new
description: This flag toggles on/off the whole subpage found at Studies/View Listings/Analysis Study Metadata (New)

name: new_activity_instance_wizard_stepper
description: This flag toggles on/off the new wizard stepper to create/edit Activity Instances (Library/Concepts/Activities/Activity Instances)

name: activity_instance_wizard_stepper_categoric_findings
description: This flag toggles on/off the Categoric Findings use case in the new wizard stepper for activity instances

name: activity_instance_wizard_stepper_textual_findings
description: This flag toggles on/off the Textual Findings use case in the new wizard stepper for activity instances

name: compounds_library
description: This flag toggles on/off the whole subpage found at Library/Concepts/Compounds

name: compounds_studies
description: This flag toggles on/off the whole subpage found at Studies/Define Study/Study Interventions

name: complexity_score_calculation
description: Enables complexity score calculation on the Detailed SoA page

name: study_data_suppliers
description: This flag toggles on/off the Study Data Suppliers page found at Studies/Manage/Study Data Suppliers

name: study_data_suppliers_create_from_study
description: This flag toggles on/off the ability to create a user-defined data supplier from study level (Add a user defined data supplier button)
